children.text: Preface

Today, on my father-in-law's birthday, I begin to author this master document for the Income Insurance program.  What it intends to do is provide the framework for people to be able to access the intellectual resources to comprehend the flow of the economy and never make a foul move — to always know that they will be able to find what they need — and to have that sense of providence properly represented in financial ledgers.
-Jeremiah
Collaborators
King Jeremiah
Queen Lauren
Introduction

Someone somewhere has to have some idea how to produce something that will satisfy us to see as our first chapter.  That person could be the king, he is not sure.  So.  He's never written a book.  A stranger would probably look at this and say, "Look at these floundering folks.  This is a website called Crousia, but the main page is titled Income Insurance.  What are they even doing?"  An AI would probably read this and say, "Here, change this to that, and that to this," and we still wouldn't feel good about any of it.

But if we have collaborators, each paying $5 a month for the opportunity to participate in something deep, meaningful, and perhaps even far-reaching, then perhaps we will all feel like something is worthwhile which is going forward into the abyss.  The trouble is if we keep it all in first-person, then people will be putting words into the king's mouth, which isn't the sort of collaboration we are supposed to be experiencing.  Thus, we have switched out all of the pronouns as appropriate.
Chapter 1

It has been concluded that the general idea of Income Insurance can be put into practice via connecting people to their true calling; someone with money finds someone without money, and both are looking for Income Insurance, so the person with the money pays the person without the money to learn a skill or a trade which is (we assume) aligned with their core drives and motivations.  The person without money begins to earn income and then gives the person with money a return on their investment.  Everybody wins, and Income Insurance is the system both parties have in common.

One might put it this way: we generate a pool, and people pay a percentage of their monthly earnings into this pool.  The money in the pool is dedicated to self-improvement.  If a poor person can justify a withdrawal, he or she can use that withdrawn money to improve his or her earning potential.  This is a simple plan, applicable to a simple poor person.  Whereas for a rich person it is slightly more involved.  Let's say they want to deploy rockets to Mars — they must also justify it as self-improvement.  For instance the money could be used on courses in persuasion, so that the rich person may learn how to persuade others to support their rocket-building prospect with something other than just raw cash — for instance, when approaching the Federal Reserve, one is not the empowered party, no matter how much money one has, for one does not have the power to produce money from thin air.

This is a very popular idea, we are sure, for the masses of less endowed persons.  Many, many people with low present earning potential may transform themselves into higher earners, who continue to participate in the Income Insurance program because they have seen results.  This grows the pool.  Of course we cannot start out with any number of poor persons initially because the withdrawal requests will exceed the deposits — so we must figure out how to present and promote this to wealthier members of society.  Just a small discrepancy in earning potential between two very similar classes can stimulate the growth of this system; all that it requires is that one person has money to invest in someone else with the expectation that they will later be able to invest in themselves to a greater degree possible than without Income Insurance.
Cool. Sounds good KJ. 👍 ❤️
So speaks the queen, whose main power (which she has not chosen to employ here) is the all-important Veto.  With this, we conclude the first chapter.
Chapter 2

This chapter will be about a particular case study.  The king was going to explore RTT hypnotherapy training.  The queen had $10,000 in funds to devote to whatever the kingdom sees itself needing.  In this case, she chose not to direct these funds to this purpose.  So, the king goes along his merry way continuing to receive free training in AI Software Engineering... and he continues to upkeep this website.  He thinks that now he will modify the view of the document, which has nothing at all to do with its content, and everything to do with the ease of use for future collaborators.  It would seem that the entire purpose and point of Income Insurance have been lost to the tides of time and to the great abyss referenced in the introduction.  Not so!  It will pick up shortly.

So we had some kind of issues with the programming but we believe it is all settled now.  Anyone should now be able to click the tabs and navigate to different places in this document.  Back to hypnotherapy — we wonder if it's at all hypnotizing reading words like this that go on and on and on.  It would be, for the correct person.  And ultimately, we may have given up the idea of the king becoming an RTT hypnotherapist, but we can still make the world a better place, and people can still pay $5 to participate in helping.

The king chatted with Deepseek today about yuan (renminbi) and other topics to try and understand if China can be of any use to an American, and it seems like the long answer is maybe, but the king is more of a Crousian, and a Crousian has trouble with languages which do not render any meaning to "King Jeremiah of Crousia".  The king also spoke with a Mr. White about various topics — predominantly of which was how people are less likely to donate to a man as to a woman, and how it is felt like true value is divorced from money.  This is a troublesome direction, we think.

But we have considered thus to create a new currency which is already extant.  How can this be done?  Well look at it like this: we define our mental space as empty and void and then we Define "USD" as "that which there will never be enough of", and contrast that with a new definition.  There is yet to be a name for it, but it is "that of which there will always be enough".
We
could

link that back to USD if we just forewent the original definition.  This seems harder than simply defining some new money.  We enjoy coming up with new names for things in Crousia, so what will we call "that of which there will always be enough"?  The Crousmark?  Hmm... let us research what the English did when they came up with "Sterling".
(the reader is invited to study history)

Alright.  So, the Crousmark.  Backed by breathing.  That of which there will always be enough.  Defined in a vacuum.  Well this is good, this is very good, we are glad that there is always enough breathing.  In a vacuum there is never enough USD because you can't breathe USD in a vacuum.  This is just the thing the kingdom needs.  Breath.  God couldn't have done better, when he said "let there be light" he wasn't considering that light without breathing is death, and dark with breathing is life.  He put things in a very strange orientation, we believe.

And from the air in our lungs, we expel a vital nutrients for living plants.  This is the proper beginning of a repeating life sequence.  Breathe in, breathe out.  The plants have taken your nutrients and changed them back into their original form, so that you can return to your original state, and choose to feed them again, or not.  One must wonder if one chooses not to breathe will one absolutely necessarily die?  The Crousmark ensures that this is not a necessary experiment.  There is always enough breathing, and there is never too much of it.  This is a good way to keep a mind in check, to orient, to balance the life and keep a self in proper alignment with the forces of community.  The truth is that there are plants — and they wish to be fed nutrients.  So you will breathe.
Hypnotherapy complete.
Chapter 3
